title: Messages
subtitle: Ready-made messages (templates) you reuse every time. Use them as-is or create your own versions.
howToText: You write the message once, and when you send it the app automatically fills in each client's details — name, products, total. The tabs below are the moments in your relationship with a client: on „Home” AromaTool tells you which moment each contact is at and, when you send, it automatically suggests the active message from the matching tab.
insertTitle: Tap to add this field to the text
autoProductsHint: On Follow-up, the products from the client's last offer appear in the email automatically — you don't need to add them manually.

variables.produse: List of products in the offer

needs_offer.label: 📨 First offer
needs_offer.desc: For a new contact you haven't sent any offer to yet. It's the first step to introduce your products.

needs_followup.label: 🔄 Follow-up
needs_followup.desc: To gently check back with someone who received an offer but hasn't replied yet.

first_order.label: 🎉 New client
first_order.desc: A welcome message, sent right after a client's first order.

reorder.label: 🔁 Reorder
reorder.desc: To remind a loyal client about their monthly order / to restock.

reactivate.label: 🌱 Reactivation
reactivate.desc: For clients who haven't ordered in a while — to bring them back.

discuss_business.label: 🤝 Business
discuss_business.desc: For someone interested in the opportunity to become a distributor.

newFormHint: You're creating a reusable message: write it once now, then send it with one click every time you need to do this.
headlinePlaceholderNew: e.g. A special offer for you
headlinePlaceholderEdit: e.g. Did you see my offer?
bodyPlaceholderNew: e.g. Hi {{nume}}, I have something special for you...
bodyPlaceholderEdit: e.g. Hi {{nume}}, I'm following up on the offer I sent {{zile}} days ago...
attachHint: They appear automatically as buttons in the email when you send this message (you can adjust them when sending).
attachReminder: This message tells the client you're attaching a material. Add it below under „Default attached materials”, otherwise the email promises something that isn't sent.
noResources: You don't have any resources yet. Add them from the „Resources” page.
saveError: The change could not be saved. Please try again.
deleteError: The message could not be deleted. Please try again.
deleteErrorInUse: This message was already used in a send, so it can't be deleted yet. Apply the database update (FK ON DELETE SET NULL) and then try again.
emptyHint: Tap „+ New message” to create your first message.
